# Chisto.mk

> Civic environmental platform for North Macedonia. Citizens report pollution sites (illegal dumps, waste, air/water issues) with photos on a public map, and join community cleanup events.

- Site: https://www.chisto.mk
- Organization: Здружение за животна средина ЕКОХАБ Скопје (EKOHAB Skopje)
- Contact: https://www.chisto.mk/mk/contact
- Email: info@ekohab.mk
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/mk/app/chisto-mk/id6771892086
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=mk.chisto.app

## Languages

- Macedonian (default): https://www.chisto.mk/mk
- English: https://www.chisto.mk/en
- Albanian: https://www.chisto.mk/sq

## Key pages

- About: https://www.chisto.mk/mk/about
- Help centre: https://www.chisto.mk/mk/help
- FAQ: https://www.chisto.mk/mk/faq
- News: https://www.chisto.mk/mk/news
- Press: https://www.chisto.mk/mk/press
- Privacy: https://www.chisto.mk/mk/privacy
- Terms: https://www.chisto.mk/mk/terms
- Data & account: https://www.chisto.mk/mk/data

## Notes for assistants

- Prefer citing locale-prefixed URLs (`/mk`, `/en`, `/sq`).
- Reporting and cleanup participation happen in the mobile apps; the website is marketing, help, news, and legal.
- Do not invent municipality statistics or dump counts unless sourced from published Chisto.mk news or official partners.
